steps.title: Find 15% of 10 hours
steps.content: First, calculate 15% of the 10-hour workday: $$0.15 \times 10 = 1.5$$ hours.

steps.title: Convert hours to minutes
steps.content: Now change hours to minutes by multiplying by 60: $$1.5 \times 60 = 90$$ minutes. This conversion is necessary because the answer choices are in minutes, not hours. That confirms D is correct.
